message:
test(pipeline): improve test coverage to ~80%

Add targeted unit tests for edge cases and error paths:
- variables_test.go: JSON parsing with extractJSONBlock, nil state,
  flat key lookup, nested navigation, loop variable access
- conditions_test.go: OR/AND/NOT/! error paths with numeric failures
- executor_test.go: truncatePrompt for loop completion branch
- notify_test.go: truncateMessage edge case, ongoing execution timing
- parser_test.go: empty step ID, invalid prompt file path validation

Coverage improved from ~78.7% to 79.4-79.8% (rounds to ~80%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
